name: The Acqui-Hire
effect: Absorb an external user base into the enterprise identity graph. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: SYNERGY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When the acquisition is announced: The combined user base is considered unified.

clauses.name: MIGRATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When integration begins: Forty percent of acquired users are considered unreachable.

clauses.name: RETENTION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If churn exceeds projections: The remaining users are considered highly engaged.

witness_quote: We didn't buy the product, we bought the users.
